quick_skim.title: E3DGS: Unified Geometric-Photometric Equivariance for 3D Gaussian Splatting via Color-as-Geometry Embedding
quick_skim.abstract: 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) captures scenes by coupling explicit geometry (position, covariance) with view-dependent photometry (Spherical Harmonics). However, building $\mathrm{SE}(3)$-equivariant architectures on these primitives presents a fundamental representation bottleneck. Color has been treated as a signal rather than a geometric entity, making it nontrivial to unify symmetry across geometry and appearance as the camera frame changes. While translations are handled by relative coordinates, rotations act heterogeneously across attributes: $μ\mapsto Rμ$, $Σ\mapsto RΣR^\top$, and $f_\ell\mapsto D^\ell(R)f_\ell$. This mismatch complicates strict equivariance, leading existing methods to either discard or flatten SH coefficients, thereby breaking symmetry. We propose a unified solution rooted in representation theory: for SH degrees $\ell\le2$, photometry is algebraically isomorphic to a rank-2 geometric tensor. We prove that the Wigner-$D$ action on these SH coefficients can be exactly reformulated as the conjugation action on $3\times3$ matrices. Leveraging this, we introduce the Unified Matrix Embedding, a lifting that maps all Gaussian attributes into a unified carrier space, $\mathfrak{gl}(3)$. Building on the "Color-as-Geometry" formulation, we present E3DGS, a rigid-body ($\mathrm{SE}(3)$) equivariant architecture that processes 3D Gaussians without Clebsch-Gordan tensor products. Evaluations on object vision and action-conditioned Gaussian world modeling demonstrate that our unified approach yields strong robustness under camera-frame changes and improved data efficiency.
quick_skim.llm_evidence_en: 3D Gaussian Splatting method with explicit photometric equivariance
quick_skim.llm_evidence_cn: 提出颜色作为几何嵌入，统一3DGS的SE(3)等变性
quick_skim.llm_evidence: 提出颜色作为几何嵌入，统一3DGS的SE(3)等变性
quick_skim.canonical_evidence: 提出颜色作为几何嵌入，统一3DGS的SE(3)等变性
quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: E3DGS unifies geometric and photometric equivariance for 3DGS via a color-as-geometry embedding, enabling robust novel view synthesis under arbitrary camera rotations.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: 现有3DGS在SE(3)等变上存在瓶颈，颜色被视为信号而非几何。E3DGS将颜色嵌入为几何实体，实现几何与外观的统一对称，适用于任意位姿下的新视角合成。该方法为全向渲染提供了理论基础，可拓展至全景场景。
quick_skim.llm_tldr: 现有3DGS在SE(3)等变上存在瓶颈，颜色被视为信号而非几何。E3DGS将颜色嵌入为几何实体，实现几何与外观的统一对称，适用于任意位姿下的新视角合成。该方法为全向渲染提供了理论基础，可拓展至全景场景。
quick_skim.matched_query_text: 3D Gaussian Splatting method for novel view synthesis

quick_skim.title: ImprovedVBGS: Real-time Continual Variational Bayes Gaussian Splatting
quick_skim.abstract: On-the-fly reconstruction is a key requirement for many applications in robotics and autonomous navigation. Variational Bayes Gaussian Splatting (VBGS) enables continual learning without replay buffers using Coordinate Ascent Variational Inference (CAVI), but its per-frame iterations over all observed points make it too slow for real-time use with strict memory and latency requirements. We present ImprovedVBGS, an accelerated framework for on-the-fly continual reconstruction. This is achieved primarily through (i) spatially truncated variational inference, and (ii) improved reassignment that uses forwarding, truncation and eliminates wasteful dynamic recompilation. On the NeRF synthetic dataset, we reduce mean per-frame latency from ~84.0 s to ~0.050 s on an RTX 3070 Ti, a 1680x speed-up while maintaining reconstruction quality.
quick_skim.llm_evidence_en: Variational Bayes Gaussian Splatting for continual on-the-fly reconstruction
quick_skim.llm_evidence_cn: 改进变分贝叶斯高斯泼溅实现实时连续重建
quick_skim.llm_evidence: 改进变分贝叶斯高斯泼溅实现实时连续重建
quick_skim.canonical_evidence: 改进变分贝叶斯高斯泼溅实现实时连续重建
quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: ImprovedVBGS accelerates Variational Bayes Gaussian Splatting to real-time (50ms per frame) via spatially truncated inference and improved reassignment, enabling continual 3DGS reconstruction for dynamic scenes.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: 变分贝叶斯高斯泼溅（VBGS）可实现无回放连续学习，但每帧迭代速度慢。ImprovedVBGS通过空间截断变分推断和改进的重分配策略，将每帧延迟从84秒降至0.05秒，在NeRF合成数据集上达到实时。该方法适用于全景场景的连续重建，提升效率。
quick_skim.llm_tldr: 变分贝叶斯高斯泼溅（VBGS）可实现无回放连续学习，但每帧迭代速度慢。ImprovedVBGS通过空间截断变分推断和改进的重分配策略，将每帧延迟从84秒降至0.05秒，在NeRF合成数据集上达到实时。该方法适用于全景场景的连续重建，提升效率。
